1.title: LambdaFunction number of times a function is invoked
1.query:
timeseries invocations = avg(dt.cloud.aws.lambda.invocations),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_lambda_function }
| fieldsAdd aws_lambda_function_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_lambda_function)
| sort arrayAvg(invocations) desc
| limit 20

2.title: LambdaFunction concurrent executions count
2.query:
timeseries conc_executions = avg(dt.cloud.aws.lambda.conc_executions),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_lambda_function }
| fieldsAdd aws_lambda_function_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_lambda_function)
| sort arrayAvg(conc_executions) desc
| limit 20

3.title: LambdaFunction code execution time.
3.query:
timeseries duration = avg(dt.cloud.aws.lambda.duration),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_lambda_function }
| fieldsAdd aws_lambda_function_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_lambda_function)
| sort arrayAvg(duration) desc
| limit 20

4.title: LambdaFunction rate of failed invocations to all invocations %
4.query:
timeseries errors_rate = avg(dt.cloud.aws.lambda.errors_rate),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_lambda_function }
| fieldsAdd aws_lambda_function_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_lambda_function)
| sort arrayAvg(errors_rate) desc
| limit 20

5.title: LambdaFunction number of failed invocations with HTTP 4XX status code
5.query:
timeseries errors = avg(dt.cloud.aws.lambda.errors),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_lambda_function }
| fieldsAdd aws_lambda_function_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_lambda_function)
| sort arrayAvg(errors) desc
| limit 20

6.title: LambdaFunction throttled function invocation count
6.query:
timeseries throttlers = avg(dt.cloud.aws.lambda.throttlers),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_lambda_function }
| fieldsAdd aws_lambda_function_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_lambda_function)
| sort arrayAvg(throttlers) desc
| limit 20
